title: Sweet & Juicy Kenyan Oyster Mushrooms Stir-fry
description: A romantic and mediterranean-friendly twist on the traditional stir-fry featuring juicy oyster mushrooms seasoned with sweet Mediterranean spices.
instructions: Clean and slice oyster mushrooms into bite-sized pieces.
Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add finely chopped onions and cook until translucent.
Add minced garlic and cook for another minute, stirring frequently to prevent burning.
Toss in sliced oyster mushrooms with the onions and garlic. Cook for about 5-7 minutes until they start to brown slightly.
Mix together balsamic vinegar, sugar, and red pepper flakes (if using). Pour this mixture over the mushroom mixture.
Stir well to combine all ingredients evenly. Cover and cook for an additional 3-4 minutes or until mushrooms are tender and lightly caramelized.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
